title: A Lot Of FPS
description: A lightweight pack that maximizes Minecraft’s performance on any PC. Get higher FPS and a smoother experience while keeping the game looking exactly as it should.
body:
## 🚀 A Lot Of FPS
**The purest way to play Minecraft at 500+ FPS.**

No bloat. No useless features. This pack uses a modern rendering stack and advanced logic optimizations to provide a stutter-free experience. 100% compatible with any server.

## 🛠️ Performance Stack
To achieve these results, this project focuses on cutting-edge technologies:

* **Vulkan Rendering:** Powered by **VulkanMod** to replace the outdated OpenGL, offering superior performance on modern GPUs.
* **Multithreading:** Utilizes **C2ME** (Concurrent Chunk Management Engine) to distribute world loading across all your CPU cores.
* **Aggressive Culling:** Includes **Entity Culling** and **More Culling** to stop rendering what you can't see, saving massive GPU resources.
* **Memory Optimization:** Uses **FerriteCore** to reduce RAM usage by up to 50%.
* **Optimized UI & Logic:** **BadOptimizations** and **ImmediatelyFast** remove rendering bottlenecks in the UI and entity code.

## ✨ Quality of Life
* **Instant Loading:** With **Remove Reloading Screen**, you'll never have to stare at the red Mojang loading bar when changing resource packs or settings again.

## 💻 Benchmark

Tested on Minecraft 1.21.11 | Render Distance: 16 Chunks | Simulation: 16 Chunks

| Test            | Graphics Settings | Average FPS |
|-----------------|:-----------------:|:-----------:|
| Vanilla         | Fancy             | ~120 FPS    |
| A Lot Of FPS    | Fancy             | ~420 FPS    |

### My Test System
Here's the system I used for this benchmark.

| Test   | Specification           |
|--------|:-----------------------:|
| OS     | Windows 11              |
| CPU    | Intel Core i5-12450H    |
| GPU    | NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 |
| RAM    | 24 GB                   |

## ⚠️ Known Issues & Debug
* **Vulkan Support:** Ensure your GPU drivers are up to date to support the Vulkan API.
* **Black Textures:** If the game displays no textures (completely black screen), simply restart the game client.

## ⚡ QuickStart

1. Download the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app).
2. Install the [A Lot Of FPS](https://modrinth.com/modpack/a-lot-of-fps/version/latest) via "Browse" in the app.
3. Play and enjoy a lot of **FPS**.
